## Context Imports

```sudolang
import("specs/ARCHITECTURE.md")
import("specs/DB_DESIGN.md")
import("specs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md")
import("specs/FEATURES.md")
```

---

## Architecture

```sudolang
// Package-by-Feature Structure
// src/commonMain/kotlin/com/budgetcalendar/features/[feature-name]/
// ├── data/
// │   ├── local/           # SQLDelight queries
// │   ├── repository/      # [Feature]RepositoryImpl
// │   └── mapper/          # [Feature]Mapper
// ├── domain/
// │   ├── model/           # [Feature] domain models
// │   ├── repository/      # I[Feature]Repository interface
// │   └── usecase/         # Use cases for this feature
// └── presentation/
//     ├── [Feature]ViewModel.kt
//     └── [Feature]UiState.kt
```

---

## Data Model

```sudolang
// Domain Models
interface [FeatureName] {
  id: Long;
  // Add fields here
  createdAt: Long;         // Unix timestamp ms
  updatedAt: Long;
}

// Optional: enums used by this feature
enum [EnumName] {
  VALUE_ONE = "value_one"
  VALUE_TWO = "value_two"
}

// Request/Response Models
interface Create[FeatureName]Request {
  // Fields required to create this entity
}

interface Update[FeatureName]Request {
  // Optional fields for partial updates
}

// UI State Model
interface [FeatureName]UiState {
  items: List<[FeatureName]>;
  selected[FeatureName]: [FeatureName]?;
  isLoading: Boolean;
  error: String?;
}
```

---

## Constraints

```sudolang
Constraint: [Business rule 1 — invariant that must always hold]
Constraint: [Business rule 2]
Constraint: [Validation rule — e.g. field X must be between Y and Z]
Constraint: [State rule — e.g. only valid state transitions]
// Add as many constraints as needed
```

---

## Data Flow

```sudolang
// Create [FeatureName] Flow
User Input |> validate[FeatureName]Input |> Create[FeatureName]UseCase.execute()
  |> [Feature]Repository.insert()
  |> Return [FeatureName]
  |> Update [FeatureName]UiState

// Update [FeatureName] Flow
User Input |> validate[FeatureName]Input |> Update[FeatureName]UseCase.execute(id)
  |> [Feature]Repository.update()
  |> Return Updated [FeatureName]

// Delete [FeatureName] Flow
User Request |> Check[Dependencies] |> If valid
  |> [Feature]Repository.delete()
  |> Return Success

// Get [FeatureName] Flow
User Request |> Get[FeatureName]UseCase.execute()
  |> [Feature]Repository.getAll()
  |> Map to [FeatureName]UiState
  |> Emit Flow<[FeatureName]UiState>
```

---

```sudolang

fn Get[FeatureName]s(ctx: Context): Flow<List<[FeatureName]>>
fn Get[FeatureName]ById(ctx: Context, id: Long): Result<[FeatureName]>
fn Update[FeatureName](ctx: Context, id: Long, req: Update[FeatureName]Request): Result<[FeatureName]>
fn Delete[FeatureName](ctx: Context, id: Long): Result<void>
// Add additional use-case-specific functions here
```

```sudolang
// [FeatureName]Form Props
interface [FeatureName]FormProps {
```

## Database Schema

```sudolang
// Only include if this feature introduces new tables or columns

table [table_name] {
  id: Long PK AUTOINCREMENT
  // Add columns here
  created_at: Integer NOT NULL
  updated_at: Integer NOT NULL
}

index idx_[table_name]_[column] ON [table_name]([column])
```

---

## SQLDelight Queries

```sudolang
// Only include if this feature introduces new queries

// getAll[FeatureName]s :many
SELECT * FROM [table_name] ORDER BY created_at DESC;

// get[FeatureName]ById :one
SELECT * FROM [table_name] WHERE id = :id;

// insert[FeatureName] :one
INSERT INTO [table_name] (...)
VALUES (...)
RETURNING *;

// update[FeatureName] :one
UPDATE [table_name]
SET ..., updated_at = :updated_at
WHERE id = :id
RETURNING *;

// delete[FeatureName] :exec
DELETE FROM [table_name] WHERE id = :id;
```
